sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59592" key="kraipalo/boskos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κραιπᾰλό-βοσκος</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δίψα</foreign> thirst <sense id="n59592.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">which draws on drunkenness</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1682.tlg001:25" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sopat.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">25</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
